title: Imaging/pathology metadata teaching table (openly-licensed images only)
context: Computational pathology and imaging analysis are growing cancer data-science skills, but real pathology images are almost universally controlled-access or tied to individual patients. This backlog task scopes the safest possible approach: a metadata-only teaching table derived from openly-licensed pathology image collections (e.g. The Cancer Imaging Archive open-access collections, openly-licensed pathology image repositories). The table contains image-level metadata (stain type, tissue type, magnification, image dimensions, quality score) with no patient images included in the dataset artifact — metadata only. Risk tier is medium due to license verification requirements for imaging metadata sources.
objective: Produce an imaging/pathology metadata teaching table derived exclusively from openly-licensed pathology image collections, containing image-level metadata only (no patient images), with full gate artifact and Zenodo DOI.
acceptanceCriteria: Source is an openly-licensed pathology image collection (open-access, no controlled-access lineage, no patient-identifiable images); gate-002 PASS artifact committed with license id+URL+snapshot.

Dataset contains metadata only: image identifiers (from the open collection), stain type, tissue type, magnification, image dimensions, quality metrics; no actual patient images included in the artifact.
Backlog note enforced: 'Metadata only; images must be openly licensed; no patient images' — explicitly documented in the datasheet.
Data dictionary covers all metadata columns; known limitations (e.g. images not included, metadata-only scope) documented; safety notice present.
Completeness >= 90/100; Croissant metadata valid; Zenodo DOI minted; at least 1 exercise (e.g. image metadata analysis, stratification).
Safety reviewer and domain reviewer sign-off; outputLicense: CC-BY-4.0 (propagated from open image source license); riskTier:medium.
resources: The Cancer Imaging Archive (TCIA) open-access collections (https://www.cancerimagingarchive.net/)
output: An imaging/pathology metadata teaching table (CSV/TSV) with provenance, gate PASS artifact, data dictionary, Croissant metadata, Zenodo DOI, and >= 1 teaching exercise — metadata only, no patient images.
